tests.test: Normalized RoTCE remains below required tangible-equity return.
tests.result: not passed; required evidence remains absent

tests.test: Post-stress CET1 falls below the binding requirement.
tests.result: not yet observable or not independently reproduced

tests.test: Capital release requires operating near the regulatory floor.
tests.result: not yet observable or not independently reproduced

residual_risks: Segment tangible capital and through-cycle returns cannot be independently reproduced.
A CET1 walk from binding requirement through management buffer, stress loss and approved distributions is absent.
A common severe credit, funding, legal, operational and market stress bridge is absent.
strongest_failure_path: Transformation costs remain structural, normalized RoTCE stays below the cost of equity, and a credit/regulatory shock traps or destroys capital.
